#  Download a vCard for a User Account in the Project Directory 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-project/permissions)
  * vCards are available to download for all users in the Directory tool, whether or not they have logged into Procore.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the Project level **Directory** tool.
  2. Click **Users**.
  3. Click the user's **avatar** to download the VCF file with the user's information.  
![Download Directory Vcard](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/9efff3c40b5466f71529fa85290a5921/48513e9593c4304eccb79b80261961a4/download-directory-vcard.png?fm=webp)


## See Also
  * [Directory (Project) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-project/permissions)
  * [What granular permissions are available for the company's Resource Planning tool?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-granular-permissions-are-available-for-the-companys-resource-planning-tool)
  * [Best Practices: Submittal Imports](https://v2.support.procore.com/reference-best-practices-submittal-imports)
title: Download a vCard for a User Account in the Project Directory
description: How to download a vCard for a contact record from the Company or Project level Directory tool.
